[[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] [[contributing sponsor]] '''Lerrimore Contracting Company''' was a conglomerate consisting of over three hundred subsidiaries, dedicated to the production of household appliances, goods, and furniture. By around [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], it had become a [[voting sponsor]], receiving greater profits and discounts from its former contributing sponsor status as well as unrestricted access to Authority employees.

==Description==
Lerrimore Contracting Company was a manufacturing company that produced household appliances, goods, and furniture,<ref name="HSCS" /> including the [[industrial glow rod]],<ref name="EGWT" /> and owned over three hundred subsidiaries.<ref name="HSCS" /> Its logo was a skewed [[Color/Legends|orange]] hexagon with a green border behind a horizontally aligned rectangle that was white and also had a green border. The rectangle featured a green jagged line that traveled from the bottom left corner to the top left corner, then diagonally across to the bottom right corner, and finally to the top right corner.<ref name="NewWeapons&Tech">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> The company shared its name with the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturer [[Lerrimore Droids]].<ref name="CCG">{{CCG|set=Premiere Limited|cardname=2X-3KPR}}</ref>

==History==
The company provided funds, equipment, and services equivalent to a total of fifty trillion [[Credit chip/Legends|credits]] in order to become one of numerous original [[contributing sponsor]]s of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. In return, it received nominal discounts on bulk goods and raw materials produced by the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] as well as a proportional share of [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] profits. The company would,<ref name="HSCS" /> by around [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],<ref name="HSCSinterviewDate">Interviews with [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] in ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'' note a recent interaction between her and [[Salla Zend]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. That interaction occurs in ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'', which also depicts Organa Solo subsequently and directly traveling to the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] and [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates those events to [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], and as such, the interviews and information in the sourcebook presented as "current" must occur following the [[Battle of Calamari|events]] on Mon Calamari and thus around that [[Standard year/Legends|year]].</ref> be upgraded to a [[voting sponsor]], receiving increased profits and discounts as well as unrestricted access to the employees of the Authority.<ref name="HSCS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lerrimore Contracting Company was first mentioned in ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'', a [[1993]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Michael Allen Horne]].<ref name="HSCS" /> The company's logo, created by [[Ian Fullwood]], was first depicted in the [[2004]] reference book written by [[W. Haden Blackman]], ''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''.<ref name="NewWeapons&Tech" />
